name: evidence-floor
description: Unit27 adjacent utility for reviewing whether claims meet declared evidence floors.

scripts.demo: npm run review -- examples/scenarios/portfolio_claim.md --evidence examples/scenarios/portfolio_evidence.md --policy examples/policies/evidence-floor.md --output examples/reviews/portfolio_floor_review.md --review-only && npm run review -- examples/scenarios/org_readiness_claim.md --evidence examples/scenarios/org_readiness_evidence.md --policy examples/policies/evidence-floor.md --output examples/reviews/org_readiness_floor_review.md --review-only && npm run review -- examples/scenarios/medical_safety_claim.md --evidence examples/scenarios/medical_safety_evidence.md --policy examples/policies/evidence-floor.md --output examples/reviews/medical_safety_floor_review.md --review-only
